commitAfter: the fidelity commit following e341c00 (see git log)
referenceHandling: HyprMod source re-inspected as the visual specification; running HyprMod for screenshots was not possible offline (its hyprland-* Python dependencies are not installed and need network installs), so the comparison used the source-derived layout spec plus the owner-described reference visuals; Hyprland Settings screenshots were captured and visually reviewed page-by-page during implementation; all code remains original

screenshots.iterationHistory: /tmp/hyprland-settings-visual-fidelity/settings-general.png (v1: sidebar width defect), settings-general-v2.png (v2: labels fixed)

acceptanceRules.noGenericColorButton: PASS - no Color… label exists; unparseable values show a checkered swatch button; verified in screenshots and by tests/visual_fidelity.rs
acceptanceRules.generalSectionsSeparate: PASS - screenshot shows Gaps / Borders / Border Colors / Layout / Snap as separate headed cards; 'Gaps & Borders' removed from the curated table; layout/snap/tearing keys pulled onto General via cross-tab page claims
acceptanceRules.headerShowsPageTitle: PASS - screenshot header reads 'General'; the app name moved to the sidebar identity label and window metadata; the duplicate giant content title is hidden
acceptanceRules.noRoutineStatusInline: PASS - rows show label + one-line subtitle + control only; compact badges (Blocked / Hardware required / Not proven yet / Needs attention) appear only when needed; hover leakage fixed by converting harness identification from tooltips to accessibility labels
acceptanceRules.screenshotComparisonIncluded: PASS - paths above; visual review notes below
acceptanceRules.testsProveVisibleFailuresGone: PASS - tests/visual_fidelity.rs (6 guards) pins each acceptance rule at source/model level

visualComparisonNotes.matches: header page title; sidebar identity+search-icon header, uppercase categories, icons, row sizing; centered clamped column; section headings above rounded cards; inline right-aligned controls (spins, switches, dropdown showing 'Dwindle'); stop-based color rows with per-stop swatches, removes, add, angle stepper; picker with Cancel / Pick a Color / Select, palette grid, custom HSV view (preview, hex, SV area with marker, hue and alpha sliders)
visualComparisonNotes.remainingDifferences: picker SV area uses a stepped gradient fill (28x28 cells) rather than a continuous shader; palette colors are a generated set, not a designed palette; recent/custom swatch memory not implemented; monitors/devices pages still lack live device cards (safe read-only projection needed); differences are deliberate original-implementation choices or recorded deferrals

colorRowReplacement: 22/22 color rows render stop-based swatch controls; unset rows seed from the official default value (same fallback as the detail surface), so real defaults show as swatches
colorPicker: palette + custom views implemented with original GTK code (generated palette grid, HSV conversions in ux_presentation with unit-testable math, format-preserving Select via render_color_like)
headerTitle: adw::WindowTitle follows the selected sidebar page; error window titled 'Startup Error'
sidebar: identity header with icon-only search toggle (a11y-labeled, Ctrl+F unchanged), fixed 260px column (hexpand propagation defect found via screenshot and fixed), per-page symbolic icons
sectionSplit: section_for_row curated key mapping + cross-tab extra_sources on the page model; 341/341 reachability guard updated and green
statusTextRemoval: row_badge vocabulary excludes routine states; guard proves no chip label or current-status string renders inline
validation: cargo fmt/--check, cargo check, cargo test (267 binaries, all ok), jq, git diff --check, cargo build --release, GTK evidence matrix - final summary carries results
